headline: McKesson Stock: A Compounding Engine Facing Its Critical Test
summary: McKesson’s net income grew at an average rate of 14.4% over the last three years, yet its earnings per share (EPS) increased by 19.6% annually during that same window. This 5.2% gap represents the additional value management captured for shareholders through a consistent strategy.
